docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDILLA, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETERSON, KAREN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, ALLSTATE INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
